description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily a faded orange color, showing signs of wear and dirt accumulation, especially near the base and lower cone. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with scuff marks and discoloration from outdoor use. There are no visible reflective stripes, logos, or markings on any side of the cone. The tip is rounded and solid, blending seamlessly with the rest of the cone. The base is flat, thick, and slightly beveled at the edges, designed to keep the cone upright and prevent tipping.
description: A worn, orange traffic cone with a wide square base and a rounded tip, showing visible dirt and scuff marks. No reflective stripes or markings are present.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cone's faded orange color, rounded tip, and a square base with visible dirt and scuffing.
description_view_1: This side highlights more pronounced dirt and wear on the lower cone and base, with the same rounded tip and square base.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a scuffed area near the base and a slightly lighter patch on the cone's surface, maintaining the same overall shape.
description_view_3: The cone appears uniformly worn with a rounded tip and a square, stable base, similar to other views but with less visible dirt.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and thick, made of the same orange plastic as the cone, with visible wear and dirt, providing stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The cone appears worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and fading, indicating regular outdoor use.
